Patch Set 1:

(4 comments)

It is not clear why this direct-access method is needed?  This needs the MDT to be taken offline and adds a lot of code duplication. Please add a comment to the commit message why this change is needed.

parents.subject: LU-16199 ldiskfs: make ubuntu kernel version detection better

commit.subject: LU-15880 quota: fix quota by offline file
commit.message:
LU-15880 quota: fix quota by offline file

Fix the issue related to quota setting file by reading or modifing
the quota file directly.

Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I65606e08d42ebbffdf0044aa48ca2b8b41766fa0
